PERMANENT — there is no crossing here. Asked outright 'endpoint or through route?', Callan answered 'I believe it's an end point' (2026-07-14), after 'you can drive to a sort of view point/pick nic spot'. Our poster trace invented a river crossing that does not exist on the ground. Do NOT move this back to blockers.unconfirmed-crossings.geojson and do NOT unblock on 'confirmation' — there is nothing here to confirm. Kingfisher Dam is already a POI and already routable; only the phantom river hop is cut. D85.
